user.title: SuperGreenLab Controller
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your controller. Credentials are only needed if you set an HTTP auth token on the device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller. Check the IP address and that it is on the network.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the discovered controller (it may need an auth token — add it manually instead).

layout.title: Device layout
layout.description: Enable the grow boxes you use and assign each LED channel to a box. This is written to the controller; entities are rebuilt afterwards.

settings.title: Polling settings
settings.description: How often to poll live readings (temperature, humidity, fan speeds). Config values are polled less frequently.
